title: pellaea alabamensis
intro: Pellaea alabamensis, also known as the Alabama chain fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. Native to the southeastern United States, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pellaea alabamensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential health benefits and optimal preparations.
